description: Unique repository-owned observation identifier.
Primary literature or repository source identity.
Machine-readable source artifact used for this record.
Primary-source table figure page line or coordinate locator.
Observation family such as VLE speciation density viscosity dielectric pH or ionic activity.
Physical or chemical quantity represented by the value.
Observed species when the quantity is species-specific.
Thermodynamic phase to which the observation applies.
Value as reported or transcribed without normalization; numeric zero is retained.
Unit attached to value_reported.
Composition or amount denominator attached to value_reported.
Derived value retained alongside rather than instead of the reported value.
Deterministic conversion used to create value_normalized.
Reported uncertainty value; blank means not reported and never zero uncertainty.
Standard deviation confidence interval instrument precision or other reported type.
Extent to which source uncertainty metadata covers the record.
Evidentiary role that controls whether the value may become a regression target.
Current row-level disposition in the evidence lifecycle.
Records that are experimental replicates and must stay in one validation split.
Records linked by a shared normalization or nominal-condition decision.
Required explanation for excluded records.
Recorded scientific review decision or pending review owner.
